segments.text:
Frozen
White dirt on the pine
I pull my collar tight
Hoping for a change of mind
Praying
Hard
Heavy boots in the hall
Wishing for a winter without a wall
Take it away
Make it go away
I’m sitting in the chapel praying take it away
Wash me clean
Like the snow on the roof
I just want the truth
I just want the truth
Make me brand new
Make me brand new
Heal me
Heal me
Fix what is wrong
Fix what is wrong
Cold beds
Small room
Staring at the ceiling in the gloom
I try
I try
I try to be the man they say is inside
Bible
Open
Looking for a spark
Lost in the dark
Searching for a miracle that hasn’t started yet
Counting every single sunset
Take it away
Make it go away
I’m sitting in the chapel praying take it away
Wash me clean
Like the snow on the roof
I just want the truth
I just want the truth
Make me brand new
Make me brand new
Heal me
Heal me
Fix what is wrong
Fix what is wrong
Silver bells on the gate
But I’m drowning in the weight
Is it a gift
Or is it a test
I just want to rest
I just want to rest
I just want to rest
Take it away
Make it go away
I’m sitting in the chapel praying take it away
Wash me clean
Like the snow on the roof
I just want the truth
I just want the truth
Make me brand new
Make me brand new
Merry Christmas to the holy
Merry Christmas to the lonely
Wishing I was different
Wishing I was gone
Frozen
Until the dawn
